bulbasaur.name: BULBASAUR
bulbasaur.entry: For some time after its birth, it  grows by gaining nourishment from  the seed on its back.

ivysaur.name: IVYSAUR
ivysaur.entry: When the bud on its back starts  swelling, a sweet aroma wafts to  indicate the flower’s coming bloom.

venusaur.name: VENUSAUR
venusaur.entry: After a rainy day, the flower on  its back smells stronger. The  scent attracts other Pokémon.

charmander.name: CHARMANDER
charmander.entry: The fire on the tip of its tail is a  measure of its life. If healthy,  its tail burns intensely.

charmeleon.name: CHARMELEON
charmeleon.entry: In the rocky mountains where  CHARMELEON live, their fiery  tails shine at night like stars.

charizard.name: CHARIZARD
charizard.entry: It is said that CHARIZARD’s fire  burns hotter if it has  experienced harsh battles.

squirtle.name: SQUIRTLE
squirtle.entry: It shelters itself in its shell,  then strikes back with spouts of  water at every opportunity.

wartortle.name: WARTORTLE
wartortle.entry: It is said to live 10,000 years.  Its furry tail is popular as a  symbol of longevity.

blastoise.name: BLASTOISE
blastoise.entry: The jets of water it spouts from  the rocket cannons on its shell  can punch through thick steel.

caterpie.name: CATERPIE
caterpie.entry: It releases a stench from its red  antenna to repel enemies. It  grows by molting repeatedly.

metapod.name: METAPOD
metapod.entry: A steel-hard shell protects its  tender body. It quietly endures  hardships while awaiting evolution.

butterfree.name: BUTTERFREE
butterfree.entry: It loves the honey of flowers and  can locate flower patches that  have even tiny amounts of pollen.

weedle.name: WEEDLE
weedle.entry: It eats its weight in leaves every  day. It fends off attackers with  the needle on its head.

kakuna.name: KAKUNA
kakuna.entry: While awaiting evolution, it  hides from predators under  leaves and in nooks of branches.

beedrill.name: BEEDRILL
beedrill.entry: Its best attack involves flying  around at high speed, striking with  poison needles, then flying off.

pidgey.name: PIDGEY
pidgey.entry: It is docile and prefers to avoid  conflict. If disturbed, however,  it can ferociously strike back.

pidgeotto.name: PIDGEOTTO
pidgeotto.entry: It flies over its wide territory in  search of prey, downing it  with its highly developed claws.

pidgeot.name: PIDGEOT
pidgeot.entry: By flapping its wings with all its  might, PIDGEOT can make a gust of  wind capable of bending tall trees.

rattata.name: RATTATA
rattata.entry: Cautious in the extreme, its  hardy vitality lets it live in  any kind of environment.

raticate.name: RATICATE
raticate.entry: It whittles its constantly growing  fangs by gnawing on hard things.  It can chew apart cinder walls.

spearow.name: SPEAROW
spearow.entry: It flaps its small wings busily to  fly. Using its beak, it searches  in grass for prey.

fearow.name: FEAROW
fearow.entry: It has the stamina to fly all  day on its broad wings. It  fights by using its sharp beak.

ekans.name: EKANS
ekans.entry: It sneaks through grass without  making a sound and strikes  unsuspecting prey from behind.

arbok.name: ARBOK
arbok.entry: The pattern on its belly is for  intimidation. It constricts foes  while they are frozen in fear.

pikachu.name: PIKACHU
pikachu.entry: It occasionally uses an electric  shock to recharge a fellow PIKACHU  that is in a weakened state.

raichu.name: RAICHU
raichu.entry: Its tail discharges electricity into  the ground, protecting it from  getting shocked.

sandshrew.name: SANDSHREW
sandshrew.entry: To protect itself from attackers,  it curls up into a ball. It lives in  arid regions with minimal rainfall.

sandslash.name: SANDSLASH
sandslash.entry: It curls up, then rolls into foes  with its back. Its sharp spines  inflict severe damage.

nidoran_f.name: NIDORAN♀
nidoran_f.entry: While it does not prefer to fight,  even one drop of the poison it  secretes from barbs can be fatal.

nidorina.name: NIDORINA
nidorina.entry: When it senses danger, it raises  all the barbs on its body. These  barbs grow slower than NIDORINO’s.

nidoqueen.name: NIDOQUEEN
nidoqueen.entry: Its entire body is armored with  hard scales. It will protect the  young in its burrow with its life.

nidoran_m.name: NIDORAN♂
nidoran_m.entry: It scans its surroundings by  raising its ears out of the grass.  Its toxic horn is for protection.

nidorino.name: NIDORINO
nidorino.entry: It has a violent disposition and  stabs foes with its horn, which  oozes poison upon impact.

nidoking.name: NIDOKING
nidoking.entry: One swing of its mighty tail can  snap a telephone pole as if it were  a matchstick.

clefairy.name: CLEFAIRY
clefairy.entry: It is said that happiness will come  to those who see a gathering of  CLEFAIRY dancing under a full moon.

clefable.name: CLEFABLE
clefable.entry: It is very wary and rarely shows  itself to people. Its ears can hear  a pin drop over half a mile away.

vulpix.name: VULPIX
vulpix.entry: It controls balls of fire. As it  grows, its six tails split from  their tips to make more tails.

ninetales.name: NINETALES
ninetales.entry: Its nine tails are said to be  imbued with a mystic power.  It can live for a thousand years.

jigglypuff.name: JIGGLYPUFF
jigglypuff.entry: When it wavers its big, round  eyes, it begins singing a lullaby  that makes everyone drowsy.

wigglytuff.name: WIGGLYTUFF
wigglytuff.entry: Its fine fur feels sublime to the  touch. It can expand its body by  inhaling air.

zubat.name: ZUBAT
zubat.entry: It checks its surroundings and  location using reflections of the  ultrasonic waves from its mouth.

golbat.name: GOLBAT
golbat.entry: Its sharp fangs puncture the  toughest of hides and have small  holes for greedily sucking blood.

oddish.name: ODDISH
oddish.entry: It often plants its root feet in the  ground during the day and sows  seeds as it walks about at night.

gloom.name: GLOOM
gloom.entry: The honey it drools from its mouth  smells so atrocious, it can curl  noses more than a mile away.

vileplume.name: VILEPLUME
vileplume.entry: Its petals are the largest in the  world. As it walks, it scatters  extremely allergenic pollen.

paras.name: PARAS
paras.entry: Mushrooms named tochukaso grow  on its back. They grow along  with the host PARAS.

parasect.name: PARASECT
parasect.entry: A mushroom grown larger than the  host’s body controls PARASECT.  It scatters poisonous spores.

venonat.name: VENONAT
venonat.entry: Its big eyes are actually clusters  of tiny eyes. At night, its kind is  drawn by light.

venomoth.name: VENOMOTH
venomoth.entry: It flutters its wings to scatter  dustlike scales. The scales leach  toxins if they contact skin.

diglett.name: DIGLETT
diglett.entry: A Pokémon that lives underground.  Because of its dark habitat, it is  repelled by bright sunlight.

dugtrio.name: DUGTRIO
dugtrio.entry: Its three heads move alternately,  driving it through tough soil to  depths of over 60 miles.

meowth.name: MEOWTH
meowth.entry: It is nocturnal in nature. If it  spots something shiny, its eyes  glitter brightly.

persian.name: PERSIAN
persian.entry: A very haughty Pokémon. Among  fans, the size of the jewel in its  forehead is a topic of much talk.

psyduck.name: PSYDUCK
psyduck.entry: Overwhelmed by enigmatic abilities,  it suffers a constant headache. It  sometimes uses mysterious powers.

golduck.name: GOLDUCK
golduck.entry: It is seen swimming dynamically and  elegantly using its well-developed  limbs and flippers.

mankey.name: MANKEY
mankey.entry: It lives in treetop colonies.  If one becomes enraged, the whole  colony rampages for no reason.

primeape.name: PRIMEAPE
primeape.entry: It grows angry if you see its eyes  and gets angrier if you run. If you  beat it, it gets even madder.

growlithe.name: GROWLITHE
growlithe.entry: A Pokémon with a loyal nature.  It will remain motionless until it is  given an order by its Trainer.

arcanine.name: ARCANINE
arcanine.entry: Its proud and regal appearance  has captured the hearts of  people since long ago.

poliwag.name: POLIWAG
poliwag.entry: Its skin is so thin, its internal  organs are visible. It has trouble  walking on its newly grown feet.

poliwhirl.name: POLIWHIRL
poliwhirl.entry: The spiral pattern on its belly  subtly undulates. Staring at it  gradually causes drowsiness.

poliwrath.name: POLIWRATH
poliwrath.entry: With its extremely tough muscles,  it can keep swimming in the Pacific  Ocean without resting.

abra.name: ABRA
abra.entry: Using its psychic power is such a  strain on its brain that it needs  to sleep for 18 hours a day.

kadabra.name: KADABRA
kadabra.entry: It stares at its silver spoon to  focus its mind. It emits more alpha  waves while doing so.

alakazam.name: ALAKAZAM
alakazam.entry: The spoons clutched in its hands  are said to have been created by  its psychic powers.

machop.name: MACHOP
machop.entry: Though small in stature, it is  powerful enough to easily heft and  throw a number of GEODUDE at once.

machoke.name: MACHOKE
machoke.entry: It happily carries heavy cargo to  toughen up. It willingly does hard  work for people.

machamp.name: MACHAMP
machamp.entry: Its four muscled arms slam foes  with powerful punches and chops  at blinding speed.

bellsprout.name: BELLSPROUT
bellsprout.entry: It prefers hot and humid  environments. It is quick at  capturing prey with its vines.

weepinbell.name: WEEPINBELL
weepinbell.entry: A Pokémon that appears to be a  plant. It captures unwary prey by  dousing them with a toxic powder.

victreebel.name: VICTREEBEL
victreebel.entry: It pools in its mouth a fluid with  a honeylike scent, which is really  an acid that dissolves anything.

tentacool.name: TENTACOOL
tentacool.entry: Because its body is almost entirely  composed of water, it shrivels up if  it is washed ashore.

tentacruel.name: TENTACRUEL
tentacruel.entry: It extends its 80 tentacles to  form an encircling poisonous net  that is difficult to escape.

geodude.name: GEODUDE
geodude.entry: At rest, it looks just like a rock.  Carelessly stepping on it will make  it swing its fists angrily.

graveler.name: GRAVELER
graveler.entry: It rolls on mountain paths to move.  Once it builds momentum, no Pokémon  can stop it without difficulty.

golem.name: GOLEM
golem.entry: Even dynamite can’t harm its hard,  boulderlike body. It sheds its hide  just once a year.

ponyta.name: PONYTA
ponyta.entry: As a newborn, it can barely stand.  However, through galloping, its  legs are made tougher and faster.

rapidash.name: RAPIDASH
rapidash.entry: When at an all-out gallop, its  blazing mane sparkles, enhancing  its beautiful appearance.

slowpoke.name: SLOWPOKE
slowpoke.entry: Although slow, it is skilled at  fishing with its tail. It does not  feel pain if its tail is bitten.

slowbro.name: SLOWBRO
slowbro.entry: Though usually dim witted, it  seems to become inspired if the  SHELLDER on its tail bites down.

magnemite.name: MAGNEMITE
magnemite.entry: The faster the units at its sides  rotate, the greater the magnetic  force they generate.

magneton.name: MAGNETON
magneton.entry: Many mysteriously appear when more  sunspots dot the sun. They stop  TV sets from displaying properly.

farfetchd.name: FARFETCH’D
farfetchd.entry: It can’t live without the stalk it  holds. That’s why it defends the  stalk from attackers with its life.

doduo.name: DODUO
doduo.entry: The brains in its two heads appear  to communicate emotions to each  other with a telepathic power.

dodrio.name: DODRIO
dodrio.entry: When DODUO evolves into this odd  breed, one of its heads splits into  two. It runs at nearly 40 mph.

seel.name: SEEL
seel.entry: A Pokémon that lives on icebergs.  It swims in the sea using the point  on its head to break up ice.

dewgong.name: DEWGONG
dewgong.entry: In snow, the pure white coat  covering its body obscures it from  predators.

grimer.name: GRIMER
grimer.entry: It was born when sludge in a dirty  stream was exposed to the moon’s  X-rays. It appears among filth.

muk.name: MUK
muk.entry: A toxic fluid seeps from its body.  The fluid instantly kills plants and  trees on contact.

shellder.name: SHELLDER
shellder.entry: It swims backward by opening and  closing its two shells. Its large  tongue is always kept hanging out.

cloyster.name: CLOYSTER
cloyster.entry: It fights by keeping its shell  tightly shut for protection and  by shooting spikes to repel foes.

gastly.name: GASTLY
gastly.entry: Born from gases, anyone would  faint if engulfed by its gaseous  body, which contains poison.

haunter.name: HAUNTER
haunter.entry: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap  shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its  touch causes endless shuddering.

gengar.name: GENGAR
gengar.entry: The leer that floats in darkness  belongs to a GENGAR delighting in  casting curses on people.

onix.name: ONIX
onix.entry: It burrows through the ground  at a speed of 50 mph while  feeding on large boulders.

drowzee.name: DROWZEE
drowzee.entry: It can tell what people are  dreaming by sniffing with its big  nose. It loves fun dreams.

hypno.name: HYPNO
hypno.entry: Seeing its swinging pendulum can  induce sleep in three seconds,  even in someone who just woke up.

krabby.name: KRABBY
krabby.entry: It lives in burrows dug on sandy  beaches. Its pincers fully grow  back if they are broken in battle.

kingler.name: KINGLER
kingler.entry: The larger pincer has 10,000-  horsepower strength. However, it  is so heavy, it is difficult to aim.

voltorb.name: VOLTORB
voltorb.entry: It looks just like a Poké Ball.  It is dangerous because it may  electrocute or explode on touch.

electrode.name: ELECTRODE
electrode.entry: It is known to drift on winds if it  is bloated to bursting with stored  electricity.

exeggcute.name: EXEGGCUTE
exeggcute.entry: Its six eggs converse using  telepathy. They can quickly gather  if they become separated.

exeggutor.name: EXEGGUTOR
exeggutor.entry: It is called “The Walking Jungle.”  If a head grows too big, it falls  off and becomes an EXEGGCUTE.

cubone.name: CUBONE
cubone.entry: When it thinks of its dead mother,  it cries. Its crying makes the  skull it wears rattle hollowly.

marowak.name: MAROWAK
marowak.entry: From its birth, this savage Pokémon  constantly holds bones. It is  skilled in using them as weapons.

hitmonlee.name: HITMONLEE
hitmonlee.entry: Its legs can stretch double.  First-time foes are startled by  its extensible reach.

hitmonchan.name: HITMONCHAN
hitmonchan.entry: The arm-twisting punches it throws  pulverize even concrete. It rests  after three minutes of fighting.

lickitung.name: LICKITUNG
lickitung.entry: When it extends its over-six-foot-  long tongue, its tail quivers. There  is a possibility they are connected.

koffing.name: KOFFING
koffing.entry: Lighter-than-air gases in its body  keep it aloft. The gases not only  smell, they are also explosive.

weezing.name: WEEZING
weezing.entry: It grows by feeding on gases  released by garbage. Though very  rare, triplets have been found.

rhyhorn.name: RHYHORN
rhyhorn.entry: Its powerful tackles can destroy  anything. However, it is too  slow witted to help people work.

rhydon.name: RHYDON
rhydon.entry: Standing on its hind legs freed its  forelegs and made it smarter. It is  very forgetful, however.

chansey.name: CHANSEY
chansey.entry: A kindly Pokémon that lays highly  nutritious eggs and shares them  with injured Pokémon or people.

tangela.name: TANGELA
tangela.entry: The blue vines shrouding its body  are covered in a growth of fine  hair. It is known to be ticklish.

kangaskhan.name: KANGASKHAN
kangaskhan.entry: It raises its offspring in its belly  pouch. It lets the baby out to  play only when it feels safe.

horsea.name: HORSEA
horsea.entry: It makes its nest in the shade of  corals. If it senses danger, it  spits murky ink and flees.

seadra.name: SEADRA
seadra.entry: Its spines provide protection.  Its fins and bones are prized as  traditional medicine ingredients.

goldeen.name: GOLDEEN
goldeen.entry: Though it appears very elegant  when swimming with fins unfurled, it  can jab powerfully with its horn.

seaking.name: SEAKING
seaking.entry: In autumn, its body becomes more  fatty in preparing to propose to a  mate. It takes on beautiful colors.

staryu.name: STARYU
staryu.entry: If its body is torn, it can grow  back if the red core remains.  The core flashes at midnight.

starmie.name: STARMIE
starmie.entry: At the center of its body is a red  core, which sends mysterious  radio signals into the night sky.

mr_mime.name: MR. MIME
mr_mime.entry: It shapes an invisible wall in midair  by minutely vibrating its fingertips  to stop molecules in the air.

scyther.name: SCYTHER
scyther.entry: The sharp scythes on its forearms  become increasingly sharp by  cutting through hard objects.

jynx.name: JYNX
jynx.entry: Its cries sound like human speech.  However, it is impossible to tell  what it is trying to say.

electabuzz.name: ELECTABUZZ
electabuzz.entry: It windmills its arms to slightly  boost its punches. Foes have been  known to escape in the meantime.

magmar.name: MAGMAR
magmar.entry: When it breathes deeply, heat  waves form around its body, making  it hard to see clearly.

pinsir.name: PINSIR
pinsir.entry: It grips prey with its pincers  until the prey is torn in half.  What it can’t tear, it tosses far.

tauros.name: TAUROS
tauros.entry: Once it takes aim at its foe, it  makes a headlong charge. It is  famous for its violent nature.

magikarp.name: MAGIKARP
magikarp.entry: A MAGIKARP living for many years  can leap a mountain using Splash.  The move remains useless, though.

gyarados.name: GYARADOS
gyarados.entry: Once it begins to rampage, a  GYARADOS will burn everything  down, even in a harsh storm.

lapras.name: LAPRAS
lapras.entry: It loves crossing the sea with  people and Pokémon on its back.  It understands human speech.

ditto.name: DITTO
ditto.entry: It has the ability to reconstitute  its entire cellular structure to  transform into whatever it sees.

eevee.name: EEVEE
eevee.entry: Because its genetic makeup is  irregular, it quickly changes its  form due to a variety of causes.

vaporeon.name: VAPOREON
vaporeon.entry: Its cell composition is similar  to water molecules. As a result,  it can melt away into water.

jolteon.name: JOLTEON
jolteon.entry: If agitated, it uses electricity to  straighten out its fur and launch  it in small bunches.

flareon.name: FLAREON
flareon.entry: Inhaled air is heated in the flame  sac in its body to an intense fire  over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

porygon.name: PORYGON
porygon.entry: A man-made Pokémon created using  advanced scientific means. It can  move freely in cyberspace.

omanyte.name: OMANYTE
omanyte.entry: A Pokémon that was resurrected  from a fossil using modern science.  It swam in ancient seas.

omastar.name: OMASTAR
omastar.entry: It is thought that this Pokémon  became extinct because its spiral  shell grew too large.

kabuto.name: KABUTO
kabuto.entry: It is thought to have inhabited  beaches 300 million years ago.  It is protected by a stiff shell.

kabutops.name: KABUTOPS
kabutops.entry: It is thought that this Pokémon  came onto land because its  prey adapted to life on land.

aerodactyl.name: AERODACTYL
aerodactyl.entry: A Pokémon that roamed the skies  in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are  like saw blades.

snorlax.name: SNORLAX
snorlax.entry: When its belly is full, it becomes  too lethargic to even lift a finger,  so it is safe to bounce on its belly.

articuno.name: ARTICUNO
articuno.entry: A legendary bird Pokémon.  It can create blizzards by  freezing moisture in the air.

zapdos.name: ZAPDOS
zapdos.entry: A legendary Pokémon that is said  to live in thunderclouds. It freely  controls lightning bolts.

moltres.name: MOLTRES
moltres.entry: One of the legendary bird Pokémon.  It is said that its appearance  indicates the coming of spring.

dratini.name: DRATINI
dratini.entry: It is called the “Mirage Pokémon”  because so few have seen it.  Its shed skin has been found.

dragonair.name: DRAGONAIR
dragonair.entry: If its body takes on an aura, the  weather changes instantly. It is  said to live in seas and lakes.

dragonite.name: DRAGONITE
dragonite.entry: It is said to make its home  somewhere in the sea. It guides  crews of shipwrecks to shore.

mewtwo.name: MEWTWO
mewtwo.entry: A Pokémon created by recombining  MEW’s genes. It’s said to have the  most savage heart among Pokémon.

mew.name: MEW
mew.entry: Because it can use all kinds of  moves, many scientists believe MEW  to be the ancestor of Pokémon.

chikorita.name: CHIKORITA
chikorita.entry: It uses the leaf on its head to  determine the temperature and  humidity. It loves to sunbathe.

bayleef.name: BAYLEEF
bayleef.entry: The buds that ring its neck give  off a spicy aroma that perks  people up.

meganium.name: MEGANIUM
meganium.entry: Its breath has the fantastic  ability to revive dead plants and  flowers.

cyndaquil.name: CYNDAQUIL
cyndaquil.entry: It has a timid nature. If it is  startled, the flames on its back  burn more vigorously.

quilava.name: QUILAVA
quilava.entry: It intimidates foes with the heat  of its flames. The fire burns more  strongly when it readies to fight.

typhlosion.name: TYPHLOSION
typhlosion.entry: It attacks using blasts of fire.  It creates heat shimmers with  intense fire to hide itself.

totodile.name: TOTODILE
totodile.entry: It has the habit of biting anything  with its developed jaws. Even its  Trainer needs to be careful.

croconaw.name: CROCONAW
croconaw.entry: Once it bites down, it won’t let go  until it loses its fangs. New fangs  quickly grow into place.

feraligatr.name: FERALIGATR
feraligatr.entry: It usually moves slowly, but it  goes at blinding speed when it  attacks and bites prey.

sentret.name: SENTRET
sentret.entry: It has a very nervous nature.  It stands up high on its tail so it  can scan wide areas.

furret.name: FURRET
furret.entry: The mother puts its offspring to  sleep by curling up around them.  It corners foes with speed.

hoothoot.name: HOOTHOOT
hoothoot.entry: It marks time precisely. Some  countries consider it to be a wise  friend, versed in the world’s ways.

noctowl.name: NOCTOWL
noctowl.entry: Its eyes are specially developed  to enable it to see clearly even in  murky darkness and minimal light.

ledyba.name: LEDYBA
ledyba.entry: It is so timid, it can’t move if it  isn’t with a swarm of others. It  conveys its feelings with scent.

ledian.name: LEDIAN
ledian.entry: It uses starlight as energy. When  more stars appear at night, the  patterns on its back grow larger.

spinarak.name: SPINARAK
spinarak.entry: It sets a trap by spinning a web  with thin but strong silk. It waits  motionlessly for prey to arrive.

ariados.name: ARIADOS
ariados.entry: It attaches silk to its prey and  sets it free. Later, it tracks the  silk to the prey and its friends.

crobat.name: CROBAT
crobat.entry: The transformation of its legs into  wings made it better at flying, but  more clumsy at walking.

chinchou.name: CHINCHOU
chinchou.entry: It discharges positive and  negative electricity from its  antenna tips to shock its foes.

lanturn.name: LANTURN
lanturn.entry: LANTURN’s light can shine up from  great depths. It is nicknamed  “The Deep-Sea Star.”

pichu.name: PICHU
pichu.entry: The electric sacs in its cheeks are  small. If even a little electricity  leaks, it becomes shocked.

cleffa.name: CLEFFA
cleffa.entry: It is often seen when shooting  stars fill the night skies. It’s said  to arrive riding on a shooting star.

igglybuff.name: IGGLYBUFF
igglybuff.entry: It has a soft and bouncy body.  Once it starts bouncing, it  becomes impossible to stop.

togepi.name: TOGEPI
togepi.entry: It transforms the kindness and joy  of others into happiness, which it  stores in its shell.

togetic.name: TOGETIC
togetic.entry: To share its happiness, it flies  around the world seeking kind-  hearted people.

natu.name: NATU
natu.entry: It picks food from cactus plants,  deftly avoiding buds and spines.  It seems to skip about to move.

xatu.name: XATU
xatu.entry: This odd Pokémon can see both  the past and the future. It eyes  the sun’s movement all day.

mareep.name: MAREEP
mareep.entry: Its fluffy coat swells to double  when static electricity builds up.  Touching it can be shocking.

flaaffy.name: FLAAFFY
flaaffy.entry: If its coat becomes fully charged  with electricity, its tail lights up.  It fires hair that zaps on impact.

ampharos.name: AMPHAROS
ampharos.entry: The tip of its tail shines brightly.  In the olden days, people sent  signals using the tail’s light.

bellossom.name: BELLOSSOM
bellossom.entry: When the heavy rainfall season  ends, it is drawn out by warm  sunlight to dance in the open.

marill.name: MARILL
marill.entry: The oil-filled end of its tail floats  on water. It keeps MARILL from  drowning even in a strong current.

azumarill.name: AZUMARILL
azumarill.entry: It can spend all day in water,  since it can inhale and store  a large volume of air.

sudowoodo.name: SUDOWOODO
sudowoodo.entry: To avoid being attacked, it does  nothing but mimic a tree. It hates  water and flees from rain.

politoed.name: POLITOED
politoed.entry: It gathers groups of others as  their leader. Its cries make  POLIWAG obey.

hoppip.name: HOPPIP
hoppip.entry: It drifts on winds. It is said that  when HOPPIP gather in fields and  mountains, spring is on the way.

skiploom.name: SKIPLOOM
skiploom.entry: It blooms when the weather warms.  It floats in the sky to soak up as  much sunlight as possible.

jumpluff.name: JUMPLUFF
jumpluff.entry: Blown by seasonal winds, it  circles the globe, scattering  cotton spores as it goes.

aipom.name: AIPOM
aipom.entry: It lives high among the treetops.  It can use its tail as freely and  cleverly as its hands.

sunkern.name: SUNKERN
sunkern.entry: It suddenly falls out of the sky in  the morning. A year after a cold  summer, their population explodes.

sunflora.name: SUNFLORA
sunflora.entry: It gets energy from warm sunlight  and is known for its habit of  moving in pursuit of it.

yanma.name: YANMA
yanma.entry: It can hover in one spot by  flapping its wings at high speed. It  flits about to guard its territory.

wooper.name: WOOPER
wooper.entry: When walking on land, it covers its  body with a poisonous film that  keeps its skin from dehydrating.

quagsire.name: QUAGSIRE
quagsire.entry: It has an easygoing nature. It  doesn’t care if it bumps its head on  boats and boulders while swimming.

espeon.name: ESPEON
espeon.entry: Its fur is so sensitive, it can  sense minute shifts in the air  and predict the weather.

umbreon.name: UMBREON
umbreon.entry: When exposed to the moon’s aura,  the rings on its body glow faintly  and it gains a mysterious power.

murkrow.name: MURKROW
murkrow.entry: If spotted, it will lure an unwary  person into chasing it, then lose  the pursuer on mountain trails.

slowking.name: SLOWKING
slowking.entry: Being bitten by SHELLDER gave it  intelligence comparable to that of  award-winning scientists.

misdreavus.name: MISDREAVUS
misdreavus.entry: A Pokémon that startles people in  the middle of the night. It gathers  fear as its energy.

unown.name: UNOWN
unown.entry: When alone, nothing happens.  However, if there are two or more,  an odd power is said to emerge.

wobbuffet.name: WOBBUFFET
wobbuffet.entry: It desperately tries to keep its  black tail hidden. It is said to be  proof the tail hides a secret.

girafarig.name: GIRAFARIG
girafarig.entry: The head on its tail contains a  small brain. It can instinctively  fight even while facing backward.

pineco.name: PINECO
pineco.entry: It looks just like a pinecone.  Its shell protects it from bird  Pokémon that peck it by mistake.

forretress.name: FORRETRESS
forretress.entry: It is encased in a steel shell. Its  peering eyes are all that can be  seen of its mysterious innards.

dunsparce.name: DUNSPARCE
dunsparce.entry: It digs into the ground with its  tail and makes a mazelike nest.  It can fly just a little.

gligar.name: GLIGAR
gligar.entry: It glides as if sliding. It startles  foes by clamping on to their faces,  then jabs with its poison stinger.

steelix.name: STEELIX
steelix.entry: It is thought its body transformed  as a result of iron accumulating  internally from swallowing soil.

snubbull.name: SNUBBULL
snubbull.entry: Small Pokémon flee from its scary  face. It is, however, considered  by women to be cute.

granbull.name: GRANBULL
granbull.entry: It is timid in spite of its looks.  If it becomes enraged, however,  it will strike with its huge fangs.

qwilfish.name: QWILFISH
qwilfish.entry: It shoots the poison spines on its  body in all directions. Its round  form makes it a poor swimmer.

scizor.name: SCIZOR
scizor.entry: It raises its pincers with eyelike  markings for intimidation. It also  swings them down dangerously.

shuckle.name: SHUCKLE
shuckle.entry: It stores berries in its shell.  The berries eventually ferment to  become delicious juices.

heracross.name: HERACROSS
heracross.entry: It loves sweet honey. To keep all  the honey to itself, it hurls rivals  away with its prized horn.

sneasel.name: SNEASEL
sneasel.entry: A smart and sneaky Pokémon. A pair  may work together to steal eggs by  having one lure the parents away.

teddiursa.name: TEDDIURSA
teddiursa.entry: It lets honey soak into its paws  so it can lick them all the time.  Every set of paws tastes unique.

ursaring.name: URSARING
ursaring.entry: In its territory, it leaves  scratches on trees that bear  delicious berries or fruits.

slugma.name: SLUGMA
slugma.entry: Its body is made of magma.  If it doesn’t keep moving, its  body will cool and harden.

magcargo.name: MAGCARGO
magcargo.entry: Its body temperature is roughly  18,000 degrees F. Flames spout  from gaps in its hardened shell.

swinub.name: SWINUB
swinub.entry: It has a very sensitive nose. It  can locate mushrooms, berries, and  even hot springs buried under ice.

piloswine.name: PILOSWINE
piloswine.entry: Covered by a shaggy coat, it is  strong against the cold. Its tusks  of ice thicken when it snows.

corsola.name: CORSOLA
corsola.entry: Many live in the clean seas of the  south. They apparently can’t live  in polluted waters.

remoraid.name: REMORAID
remoraid.entry: It forcefully squirts water. The  water jet never misses prey even  if the REMORAID is deep in the sea.

octillery.name: OCTILLERY
octillery.entry: It loves to lurk inside holes in  rocks. It sometimes sprays ink on  prey by sticking out only its mouth.

delibird.name: DELIBIRD
delibird.entry: It carries food rolled up in its  tail. It has the habit of sharing  food with people lost in mountains.

mantine.name: MANTINE
mantine.entry: While elegantly swimming in the sea,  it ignores REMORAID that cling to  its fins seeking food scraps.

skarmory.name: SKARMORY
skarmory.entry: Despite being clad entirely in  iron-hard armor, it flies at  speeds over 180 mph.

houndour.name: HOUNDOUR
houndour.entry: It is smart enough to hunt in  packs. It uses a variety of cries  for communicating with others.

houndoom.name: HOUNDOOM
houndoom.entry: The flames it breathes when angry  contain toxins. If they cause a  burn, it will hurt forever.

kingdra.name: KINGDRA
kingdra.entry: It lives in caves on the seafloor  and creates giant whirlpools  every time it moves.

phanpy.name: PHANPY
phanpy.entry: It is strong despite its compact  size. It can easily pick up and  carry an adult human on its back.

donphan.name: DONPHAN
donphan.entry: It attacks by curling up, then  rolling into its foe. It can blow  apart a house in one hit.

porygon2.name: PORYGON2
porygon2.entry: It was upgraded to enable the  exploration of other planets.  However, it failed to measure up.

stantler.name: STANTLER
stantler.entry: Staring at its antlers creates  an odd sensation as if one were  being drawn into their centers.

smeargle.name: SMEARGLE
smeargle.entry: It marks its territory by using its  tail like a paintbrush. There are  more than 5,000 different marks.

tyrogue.name: TYROGUE
tyrogue.entry: It is famous for its eagerness to  fight and always nurses injuries  from challenging larger foes.

hitmontop.name: HITMONTOP
hitmontop.entry: It fights while spinning like a top.  The centrifugal force boosts its  destructive power by ten.

smoochum.name: SMOOCHUM
smoochum.entry: It tests everything by touching  with its lips, which remember  what it likes and dislikes.

elekid.name: ELEKID
elekid.entry: A weak electric current flows  between its horns. Sticking a hand  there shocks the unwary.

magby.name: MAGBY
magby.entry: Its magma-like blood circulates  throughout its body. Its body’s  heat can top 1,100 degrees F.

miltank.name: MILTANK
miltank.entry: It is said that kids who drink  MILTANK’s milk grow up to become  hearty, healthy adults.

blissey.name: BLISSEY
blissey.entry: The eggs it lays are filled with  happiness. Eating even one bite  will bring a smile to anyone.

raikou.name: RAIKOU
raikou.entry: It is said to have fallen with  lightning. It can fire thunderbolts  from the rain clouds on its back.

entei.name: ENTEI
entei.entry: It is said that when it roars, a  volcano erupts somewhere around  the globe.

suicune.name: SUICUNE
suicune.entry: It races around the world to  purify fouled water. It dashes  away with the north wind.

larvitar.name: LARVITAR
larvitar.entry: A Pokémon that eats soil. Once it  has eaten a large mountain, it  goes to sleep so it can grow.

pupitar.name: PUPITAR
pupitar.entry: Its body is as hard as bedrock.  By venting pressurized gas, it can  launch itself like a rocket.

tyranitar.name: TYRANITAR
tyranitar.entry: If it rampages, it knocks down  mountains and buries rivers. Maps  must be redrawn afterward.

lugia.name: LUGIA
lugia.entry: It sleeps in a deep-sea trench.  If it flaps its wings, it is said to  cause a 40-day storm.

ho_oh.name: HO-OH
ho_oh.entry: Its feathers are in seven colors.  It is said that anyone seeing it is  promised eternal happiness.

celebi.name: CELEBI
celebi.entry: It has the power to travel across  time, but it is said to appear only  in peaceful times.

treecko.name: TREECKO
treecko.entry: The soles of its feet are covered  by countless tiny spikes, enabling  it to walk on walls and ceilings.

grovyle.name: GROVYLE
grovyle.entry: It lives in dense jungles. While   closing in on its prey, it leaps  from branch to branch.

sceptile.name: SCEPTILE
sceptile.entry: The leaves that grow on its arms  can slice down thick trees. It is  without peer in jungle combat.

torchic.name: TORCHIC
torchic.entry: A fire burns inside, so it feels  very warm to hug. It launches  fireballs of 1,800 degrees F.

combusken.name: COMBUSKEN
combusken.entry: Its kicking mastery lets it loose  10 kicks per second. It emits  sharp cries to intimidate foes.

blaziken.name: BLAZIKEN
blaziken.entry: Flames spout from its wrists,  enveloping its knuckles. Its  punches scorch its foes.

mudkip.name: MUDKIP
mudkip.entry: To alert it, the fin on its head  senses the flow of water. It has  the strength to heft boulders.

marshtomp.name: MARSHTOMP
marshtomp.entry: Its sturdy legs give it sure  footing, even in mud. It  burrows into dirt to sleep.

swampert.name: SWAMPERT
swampert.entry: It can swim while towing a large  ship. It bashes down foes with a  swing of its thick arms.

poochyena.name: POOCHYENA
poochyena.entry: A Pokémon with a persistent  nature, it chases its chosen prey  until the prey becomes exhausted.

mightyena.name: MIGHTYENA
mightyena.entry: It chases down prey in a pack.  It will never disobey the commands  of a skilled Trainer.

zigzagoon.name: ZIGZAGOON
zigzagoon.entry: It walks in zigzag fashion. It is  good at finding items in the  grass and even in the ground.

linoone.name: LINOONE
linoone.entry: It charges prey at speeds over  60 mph. However, because it can  only run straight, it often fails.

wurmple.name: WURMPLE
wurmple.entry: Often targeted by bird Pokémon,  it desperately resists by releasing  poison from its tail spikes.

silcoon.name: SILCOON
silcoon.entry: It wraps silk around the branches  of a tree. It drinks rainwater on  its silk while awaiting evolution.

beautifly.name: BEAUTIFLY
beautifly.entry: Despite its looks, it is aggressive.  It jabs with its long, thin mouth if  disturbed while collecting pollen.

cascoon.name: CASCOON
cascoon.entry: It never forgets any attack it  endured while in the cocoon.  After evolution, it seeks payback.

dustox.name: DUSTOX
dustox.entry: Toxic powder is scattered with each  flap. At night, it is known to strip  leaves off trees lining boulevards.

lotad.name: LOTAD
lotad.entry: It looks like an aquatic plant and  serves as a ferry to Pokémon  that can’t swim.

lombre.name: LOMBRE
lombre.entry: It has a mischievous spirit. If it  spots an angler, it will tug on the  fishing line to interfere.

ludicolo.name: LUDICOLO
ludicolo.entry: If it hears festive music, all its  muscles fill with energy. It can’t  help breaking out into a dance.

seedot.name: SEEDOT
seedot.entry: When it dangles from a tree  branch, it looks just like an acorn.  It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.

nuzleaf.name: NUZLEAF
nuzleaf.entry: The sound of its grass flute makes  its listeners uneasy. It lives deep  in forests.

shiftry.name: SHIFTRY
shiftry.entry: By flapping its leafy fan, it can  whip up gusts of 100 ft/second  that can level houses.

taillow.name: TAILLOW
taillow.entry: It has a gutsy spirit that makes  it bravely take on tough foes. It  flies in search of warm climates.

swellow.name: SWELLOW
swellow.entry: It circles the sky in search of  prey. When it spots one, it dives  steeply to catch the prey.

wingull.name: WINGULL
wingull.entry: It soars high in the sky, riding on  updrafts like a glider. It carries  food tucked in its bill.

pelipper.name: PELIPPER
pelipper.entry: It is a messenger of the skies,  carrying small Pokémon and  eggs to safety in its bill.

ralts.name: RALTS
ralts.entry: If its horns capture the warm  feelings of people or Pokémon,  its body warms up slightly.

kirlia.name: KIRLIA
kirlia.entry: If its Trainer becomes happy, it  overflows with energy, dancing  joyously while spinning about.

gardevoir.name: GARDEVOIR
gardevoir.entry: To protect its Trainer, it will  expend all its psychic power  to create a small black hole.

surskit.name: SURSKIT
surskit.entry: It appears as if it is skating on  water. It draws prey with a sweet  scent from the tip of its head.

masquerain.name: MASQUERAIN
masquerain.entry: Its antennae have eye patterns  on them. Its four wings enable it  to hover and fly in any direction.

shroomish.name: SHROOMISH
shroomish.entry: It spouts poison spores from the  top of its head. These spores  cause pain all over if inhaled.

breloom.name: BRELOOM
breloom.entry: Its short arms stretch when it  throws punches. Its technique is  equal to that of pro boxers.

slakoth.name: SLAKOTH
slakoth.entry: It spends nearly all its time in a  day sprawled out. Just seeing it  makes one drowsy.

vigoroth.name: VIGOROTH
vigoroth.entry: Its heart beats at a tenfold  tempo, so it cannot sit still for  even a moment.

slaking.name: SLAKING
slaking.entry: The world’s laziest Pokémon. When  it is lounging, it is actually saving  energy for striking back.

nincada.name: NINCADA
nincada.entry: It grows underground, sensing  its surroundings using antennae  instead of its virtually blind eyes.

ninjask.name: NINJASK
ninjask.entry: Because it moves so quickly, it  sometimes becomes unseeable. It  congregates around tree sap.

shedinja.name: SHEDINJA
shedinja.entry: A discarded bug shell that came to  life. Peering into the crack on its  back is said to steal one’s spirit.

whismur.name: WHISMUR
whismur.entry: Usually, its cries are like quiet  murmurs. If frightened, it shrieks  at the same volume as a jet plane.

loudred.name: LOUDRED
loudred.entry: The shock waves from its cries can  tip over trucks. It stamps its  feet to power up.

exploud.name: EXPLOUD
exploud.entry: Its howls can be heard over six  miles away. It emits all sorts of  noises from the ports on its body.

makuhita.name: MAKUHITA
makuhita.entry: It toughens its body by slamming  into thick trees. Many snapped  trees can be found near its nest.

hariyama.name: HARIYAMA
hariyama.entry: It loves to match power with  big-bodied Pokémon. It can knock a  truck flying with its arm thrusts.

azurill.name: AZURILL
azurill.entry: Its tail bounces like a rubber ball.  It flings that tail around to fight  opponents bigger than itself.

nosepass.name: NOSEPASS
nosepass.entry: When endangered, it may protect  itself by raising its magnetism and  drawing iron objects to its body.

skitty.name: SKITTY
skitty.entry: It can’t stop itself from chasing  moving things, and it runs in a  circle, chasing its own tail.

delcatty.name: DELCATTY
delcatty.entry: It is highly popular among female  Trainers for its sublime fur.  It does not keep a nest.

sableye.name: SABLEYE
sableye.entry: It hides in the darkness of caves.  Its diet of gems has transformed  its eyes into gemstones.

mawile.name: MAWILE
mawile.entry: Attached to its head is a huge  set of jaws formed by horns.  It can chew through iron beams.

aron.name: ARON
aron.entry: It usually lives deep in mountains.  However, hunger may drive it to  eat railroad tracks and cars.

lairon.name: LAIRON
lairon.entry: For food, it digs up iron ore. It  smashes its steely body against  others to fight over territory.

aggron.name: AGGRON
aggron.entry: While seeking iron for food, it  digs tunnels by breaking through  bedrock with its steel horns.

meditite.name: MEDITITE
meditite.entry: It always trains deep in mountains.  It levitates when it heightens its  spiritual power through meditation.

medicham.name: MEDICHAM
medicham.entry: It gains the ability to see the aura  of its opponents by honing its mind  through starvation.

electrike.name: ELECTRIKE
electrike.entry: Using electricity stored in its fur,  it stimulates its muscles to  heighten its reaction speed.

manectric.name: MANECTRIC
manectric.entry: It discharges electricity from its  mane. It creates a thundercloud  overhead to drop lightning bolts.

plusle.name: PLUSLE
plusle.entry: It cheers on friends with pom-poms  made of sparks. It drains power  from telephone poles.

minun.name: MINUN
minun.entry: It cheers on friends. If its  friends are losing, its body lets  off more and more sparks.

volbeat.name: VOLBEAT
volbeat.entry: It communicates with others by  lighting up its rear at night. It  loves ILLUMISE’s sweet aroma.

illumise.name: ILLUMISE
illumise.entry: With its sweet aroma, it guides  VOLBEAT to draw signs with light in  the night sky.

roselia.name: ROSELIA
roselia.entry: The more healthy the ROSELIA, the  more pleasant its flowers’ aroma.  Its scent deeply relaxes people.

gulpin.name: GULPIN
gulpin.entry: Almost all its body is its stomach.  Its harsh digestive juices quickly  dissolve anything it swallows.

swalot.name: SWALOT
swalot.entry: It swallows anything whole.  It sweats toxic fluids from its  follicles to douse foes.

carvanha.name: CARVANHA
carvanha.entry: They swarm any foe that invades  their territory. Their sharp fangs  can tear out boat hulls.

sharpedo.name: SHARPEDO
sharpedo.entry: Its fangs rip through sheet iron.  It swims at 75 mph and is known as  “The Bully of the Sea.”

wailmer.name: WAILMER
wailmer.entry: On sunny days, it lands on beaches  to bounce like a ball and play.  It spouts water from its nose.

wailord.name: WAILORD
wailord.entry: The biggest of all Pokémon.  It can dive to a depth of almost  10,000 feet on only one breath.

numel.name: NUMEL
numel.entry: Its humped back stores intensely  hot magma. In rain, the magma  cools, slowing its movement.

camerupt.name: CAMERUPT
camerupt.entry: It has volcanoes on its back. If  magma builds up in its body, it  shudders, then erupts violently.

torkoal.name: TORKOAL
torkoal.entry: It burns coal inside its shell for  energy. It blows out black soot if  it is endangered.

spoink.name: SPOINK
spoink.entry: It bounces constantly, using its  tail like a spring. The shock of  bouncing keeps its heart beating.

grumpig.name: GRUMPIG
grumpig.entry: It uses black pearls to amplify its  psycho-power. It does an odd  dance to gain control over foes.

spinda.name: SPINDA
spinda.entry: No two SPINDA have the same  pattern of spots. Its tottering  step fouls the aim of foes.

trapinch.name: TRAPINCH
trapinch.entry: It makes a conical pit in desert  sand and lies in wait at the bottom  for prey to come tumbling down.

vibrava.name: VIBRAVA
vibrava.entry: It violently shudders its wings,  generating ultrasonic waves to  induce headaches in people.

flygon.name: FLYGON
flygon.entry: It whips up sandstorms with  powerful flaps of its wings. It is  known as “The Desert Spirit.”

cacnea.name: CACNEA
cacnea.entry: By storing water in its body, this  desert dweller can survive for 30  days without water.

cacturne.name: CACTURNE
cacturne.entry: It becomes active at night,  seeking prey that is exhausted  from the day’s desert heat.

swablu.name: SWABLU
swablu.entry: It can’t relax if it or its  surroundings are not clean.  It wipes off dirt with its wings.

altaria.name: ALTARIA
altaria.entry: If it bonds with a person, it will  gently envelop the friend with its  soft wings, then hum.

zangoose.name: ZANGOOSE
zangoose.entry: It has feuded with SEVIPER for  many generations. Its sharp claws  are its biggest weapons.

seviper.name: SEVIPER
seviper.entry: For many generations, it has  feuded with ZANGOOSE. It whets its  bladed tail on rocks for battle.

lunatone.name: LUNATONE
lunatone.entry: Because it turns active on nights  of the full moon, it is said to have  some link to the lunar phases.

solrock.name: SOLROCK
solrock.entry: A new Pokémon species, rumored  to be from the sun. It gives off  light while spinning.

barboach.name: BARBOACH
barboach.entry: Its slimy body is hard to grasp. In  one region, it is said to have been  born from hardened mud.

whiscash.name: WHISCASH
whiscash.entry: It is extremely protective of its  territory. If any foe approaches,  it attacks using vicious tremors.

corphish.name: CORPHISH
corphish.entry: Its hardy vitality enables it to  adapt to any environment. Its  pincers will never release prey.

crawdaunt.name: CRAWDAUNT
crawdaunt.entry: It is a ruffian that uses its  pincers to pick up and toss out  other Pokémon from its pond.

baltoy.name: BALTOY
baltoy.entry: It moves by spinning on its foot.  It is a rare Pokémon that was  discovered in ancient ruins.

claydol.name: CLAYDOL
claydol.entry: An ancient clay figurine that came  to life as a Pokémon from exposure  to a mysterious ray of light.

lileep.name: LILEEP
lileep.entry: It lived on the seafloor 100  million years ago and was  reanimated scientifically.

cradily.name: CRADILY
cradily.entry: It lives in the shallows of warm  seas. When the tide goes out, it  digs up prey from beaches.

anorith.name: ANORITH
anorith.entry: A Pokémon ancestor that was  reanimated from a fossil. It lived  in the sea and hunted with claws.

armaldo.name: ARMALDO
armaldo.entry: It went ashore after evolving.  Its entire body is clad in a sturdy  armor.

feebas.name: FEEBAS
feebas.entry: It is a shabby and ugly Pokémon.  However, it is very hardy and  can survive on little water.

milotic.name: MILOTIC
milotic.entry: Its lovely scales are described as  rainbow colored. They change color  depending on the viewing angle.

castform.name: CASTFORM
castform.entry: Its appearance changes with the  weather. Recently, its molecules  were found to be just like water.

kecleon.name: KECLEON
kecleon.entry: It can freely change its body’s  color. The zigzag pattern on its  belly doesn’t change, however.

shuppet.name: SHUPPET
shuppet.entry: It loves vengeful emotions and  hangs in rows under the eaves of  houses where vengeful people live.

banette.name: BANETTE
banette.entry: A doll that became a Pokémon over  its grudge from being junked. It  seeks the child that disowned it.

duskull.name: DUSKULL
duskull.entry: It loves the crying of children. It  startles bad kids by passing  through walls and making them cry.

dusclops.name: DUSCLOPS
dusclops.entry: It seeks drifting will-o’-the-wisps  and sucks them into its empty body.  What happens inside is a mystery.

tropius.name: TROPIUS
tropius.entry: Delicious fruits grew out from  around its neck because it always  ate the same kind of fruit.

chimecho.name: CHIMECHO
chimecho.entry: Its cries echo inside its hollow  body to emerge as beautiful notes  for startling and repelling foes.

absol.name: ABSOL
absol.entry: Rumored to sense disasters with its  horn, it became a target. It fled  deep into the mountains.

wynaut.name: WYNAUT
wynaut.entry: It grows strong by pushing up  against others en masse.  It loves eating sweet fruit.

snorunt.name: SNORUNT
snorunt.entry: It is said that several SNORUNT  gather under giant leaves and  live together in harmony.

glalie.name: GLALIE
glalie.entry: It prevents prey from escaping by  instantaneously freezing moisture  in the air.

spheal.name: SPHEAL
spheal.entry: It rolls across ice floes to reach  shore because its body is poorly  shaped for swimming.

sealeo.name: SEALEO
sealeo.entry: It habitually spins things on its  nose. By doing so, it learns  textures and odors.

walrein.name: WALREIN
walrein.entry: It shatters ice with its big tusks.  Its thick blubber repels not only  the cold, but also enemy attacks.

clamperl.name: CLAMPERL
clamperl.entry: It makes a single pearl during  its lifetime. The pearl is said  to amplify psychic power.

huntail.name: HUNTAIL
huntail.entry: It lives deep in the sea. With a  tail shaped like a small fish, it  attracts unsuspecting prey.

gorebyss.name: GOREBYSS
gorebyss.entry: It lives at the bottom of the sea.  In the springtime, its pink body  turns more vivid for some reason.

relicanth.name: RELICANTH
relicanth.entry: A rare Pokémon discovered during  a deep-sea exploration. It has not  changed in over 100 million years.

luvdisc.name: LUVDISC
luvdisc.entry: It lives in warm seas. It is said  that a couple finding this Pokémon  will be blessed with eternal love.

bagon.name: BAGON
bagon.entry: Dreaming of one day flying, it  practices by leaping off cliffs  every day.

shelgon.name: SHELGON
shelgon.entry: Within its rugged shell, its cells  have begun changing. The shell  peels off the instant it evolves.

salamence.name: SALAMENCE
salamence.entry: As a result of its long-held dream  of flying, its cellular structure  changed, and wings grew out.

beldum.name: BELDUM
beldum.entry: It converses with others by using  magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they  move in perfect unison.

metang.name: METANG
metang.entry: It is formed by two BELDUM joining  together. Its steel body won’t be  scratched if it collides with a jet.

metagross.name: METAGROSS
metagross.entry: METANG combined to form it.  With four brains, it has the  intelligence of a supercomputer.

regirock.name: REGIROCK
regirock.entry: Its entire body is made of rock.  If any part chips off in battle, it  attaches rocks to repair itself.

regice.name: REGICE
regice.entry: Its body is made of ice from the  ice age. It controls frigid air of  -328 degrees Fahrenheit.

registeel.name: REGISTEEL
registeel.entry: Tempered by pressure underground  over tens of thousands of years,  its body cannot be scratched.

latias.name: LATIAS
latias.entry: Its body is covered with a down  that can refract light in such a  way that it becomes invisible.

latios.name: LATIOS
latios.entry: A highly intelligent Pokémon.  By folding back its wings in flight,  it can overtake jet planes.

kyogre.name: KYOGRE
kyogre.entry: It is said to have widened the  seas by causing downpours. It had  been asleep in a marine trench.

groudon.name: GROUDON
groudon.entry: It had been asleep in underground  magma ever since it fiercely  fought KYOGRE long ago.

rayquaza.name: RAYQUAZA
rayquaza.entry: It lives in the ozone layer far  above the clouds and cannot be  seen from the ground.

jirachi.name: JIRACHI
jirachi.entry: It is said to have the ability to  grant any wish for just one week  every thousand years.

deoxys.name: DEOXYS
deoxys.entry: An alien virus that fell to earth  on a meteor underwent a DNA  mutation to become this Pokémon.

turtwig.name: TURTWIG
turtwig.entry: The shell on its back is made of  soil. On a very healthy TURTWIG,  the shell should feel moist.

grotle.name: GROTLE
grotle.entry: It knows where pure water wells  up. It carries fellow Pokémon there  on its back.

torterra.name: TORTERRA
torterra.entry: Some Pokémon are born on a  TORTERRA’s back and spend their  entire life there.

chimchar.name: CHIMCHAR
chimchar.entry: It is very agile. Before going to  sleep, it extinguishes the flame  on its tail to prevent fires.

monferno.name: MONFERNO
monferno.entry: It skillfully controls the intensity  of the fire on its tail to keep its  foes at an ideal distance.

infernape.name: INFERNAPE
infernape.entry: It uses unique fighting moves with  fire on its hands and feet. It will  take on any opponent.

piplup.name: PIPLUP
piplup.entry: A poor walker, it often falls down.  However, its strong pride makes it  puff up its chest without a care.

prinplup.name: PRINPLUP
prinplup.entry: Because every PRINPLUP considers  itself to be the most important,  they can never form a group.

empoleon.name: EMPOLEON
empoleon.entry: If anyone were to hurt its pride,  it would slash them with wings that  can cleave through an ice floe.

starly.name: STARLY
starly.entry: Because they are weak individually,  they form groups. However, they  bicker if the group grows too big.

staravia.name: STARAVIA
staravia.entry: Recognizing their own weakness,  they always live in a group. When  alone, a STARAVIA cries noisily.

staraptor.name: STARAPTOR
staraptor.entry: It never stops attacking even  if it is injured. It fusses over the  shape of its comb.

bidoof.name: BIDOOF
bidoof.entry: A comparison revealed that  BIDOOF’s front teeth grow at  the same rate as RATTATA’s.

bibarel.name: BIBAREL
bibarel.entry: A river dammed by BIBAREL will  never overflow its banks, which  is appreciated by people nearby.

kricketot.name: KRICKETOT
kricketot.entry: Its legs are short. Whenever it  stumbles, its stiff antennae clack  with a xylophone-like sound.

kricketune.name: KRICKETUNE
kricketune.entry: There is a village that hosts a  contest based on the amazingly  variable cries of this Pokémon.

shinx.name: SHINX
shinx.entry: The extension and contraction of  its muscles generates electricity.  It glows when in trouble.

luxio.name: LUXIO
luxio.entry: Strong electricity courses through  the tips of its sharp claws. A light  scratch causes fainting in foes.

luxray.name: LUXRAY
luxray.entry: It can see clearly through walls  to track down its prey and seek  its lost young.

budew.name: BUDEW
budew.entry: Sensitive to changing temperature,  the bud is said to bloom when it  feels the sun’s warm touch.

roserade.name: ROSERADE
roserade.entry: Each of its hands contains  different toxins, but both hands  can jab with near-fatal power.

cranidos.name: CRANIDOS
cranidos.entry: A lifelong jungle dweller from 100  million years ago, it would snap  obstructing trees with head butts.

rampardos.name: RAMPARDOS
rampardos.entry: If two were to smash their heads  together, their foot-thick skulls  would keep them from fainting.

shieldon.name: SHIELDON
shieldon.entry: It is outstandingly armored. As a  result, it can eat grass and  berries without having to fight.

bastiodon.name: BASTIODON
bastiodon.entry: When they lined up side by side, no  foe could break through. They  shielded their young in that way.

burmy.name: BURMY
burmy.entry: Even if it is born where there are  no cocooning materials, it somehow  always ends up with a cloak.

wormadam.name: WORMADAM
wormadam.entry: When evolving, its body takes in  surrounding materials. As a result,  there are many body variations.

mothim.name: MOTHIM
mothim.entry: While it loves floral honey, it won’t  gather any itself. Instead, it  plots to steal some from COMBEE.

combee.name: COMBEE
combee.entry: The trio is together from birth.  It constantly gathers honey from  flowers to please VESPIQUEN.

vespiquen.name: VESPIQUEN
vespiquen.entry: It releases various pheromones  to make the grubs in its body do  its bidding while fighting foes.

pachirisu.name: PACHIRISU
pachirisu.entry: A pair may be seen rubbing their  cheek pouches together in an  effort to share stored electricity.

buizel.name: BUIZEL
buizel.entry: It spins its two tails like a screw  to propel itself through water. The  tails also slice clinging seaweed.

floatzel.name: FLOATZEL
floatzel.entry: It is a common sight around  fishing ports. It is known to  rescue people and carry off prey.

cherubi.name: CHERUBI
cherubi.entry: The small ball is not only filled with  nutrients, it is also tasty. STARLY  try to peck it off.

cherrim.name: CHERRIM
cherrim.entry: If it senses strong sunlight, it  opens its folded petals to absorb  the sun’s rays with its whole body.

shellos.name: SHELLOS
shellos.entry: Beware of pushing strongly on  its squishy body, as it makes a  mysterious purple fluid ooze out.

gastrodon.name: GASTRODON
gastrodon.entry: Long ago, its entire back was  shielded with a sturdy shell. There  are traces of it left in its cells.

ambipom.name: AMBIPOM
ambipom.entry: Split into two, the tails are so  adept at handling and doing things,  AMBIPOM rarely uses its hands.

drifloon.name: DRIFLOON
drifloon.entry: Because of the way it floats  aimlessly, an old folktale calls it a  “Signpost for Wandering Spirits.”

drifblim.name: DRIFBLIM
drifblim.entry: At dusk, swarms of them are  carried aloft on winds. When  noticed, they suddenly vanish.

buneary.name: BUNEARY
buneary.entry: Its ears are always rolled up. They  can be forcefully extended to  shatter even a large boulder.

lopunny.name: LOPUNNY
lopunny.entry: The ears appear to be delicate. If  they are touched roughly, it kicks  with its graceful legs.

mismagius.name: MISMAGIUS
mismagius.entry: Its cry sounds like an incantation.  It is said the cry may rarely be  imbued with happiness-giving power.

honchkrow.name: HONCHKROW
honchkrow.entry: If one utters a deep cry, many  MURKROW gather quickly. For this,  it is called “Summoner of Night.”

glameow.name: GLAMEOW
glameow.entry: It hides its spiteful tendency of  hooking its claws into the nose of  its Trainer if it isn’t fed.

purugly.name: PURUGLY
purugly.entry: It binds its body with its tails to  make itself look bigger. If it locks  eyes, it will glare ceaselessly.

chingling.name: CHINGLING
chingling.entry: There is an orb inside its mouth.  When it hops, the orb bounces all  over and makes a ringing sound.

stunky.name: STUNKY
stunky.entry: It sprays a foul fluid from its  rear. Its stench spreads over a  mile radius, driving Pokémon away.

skuntank.name: SKUNTANK
skuntank.entry: It attacks by spraying a horribly  smelly fluid from the tip of its tail.  Attacks from above confound it.

bronzor.name: BRONZOR
bronzor.entry: There are researchers who believe  this Pokémon reflected like a mirror  in the distant past.

bronzong.name: BRONZONG
bronzong.entry: It brought rains by opening portals  to another world. It was revered  as a bringer of plentiful harvests.

bonsly.name: BONSLY
bonsly.entry: It prefers an arid atmosphere. It  leaks water that looks like tears  when adjusting its moisture level.

mime_jr.name: MIME JR.
mime_jr.entry: It mimics the expressions and  motions of those it sees to  understand the feelings of others.

happiny.name: HAPPINY
happiny.entry: It likes to carry around a small  rock. It may wander around others’  feet and cause them to stumble.

chatot.name: CHATOT
chatot.entry: Its tongue is just like a human’s.  As a result, it can cleverly mimic  human speech.

spiritomb.name: SPIRITOMB
spiritomb.entry: Its constant mischief and misdeeds  resulted in it being bound to an Odd  Keystone by a mysterious spell.

gible.name: GIBLE
gible.entry: It attacks using its huge mouth.  While its attacks are powerful, it  hurts itself out of clumsiness, too.

gabite.name: GABITE
gabite.entry: It loves sparkly things. It seeks  treasures in caves and hoards the  loot in its nest.

garchomp.name: GARCHOMP
garchomp.entry: It is said that when one runs at  high speed, its wings create blades  of wind that can fell nearby trees.

munchlax.name: MUNCHLAX
munchlax.entry: In its desperation to gulp down  food, it forgets about the food it  has hidden under its fur.

riolu.name: RIOLU
riolu.entry: It has the peculiar power of being  able to see emotions such as joy  and rage in the form of waves.

lucario.name: LUCARIO
lucario.entry: A well-trained one can sense auras  to identify and take in the feelings  of creatures over half a mile away.

hippopotas.name: HIPPOPOTAS
hippopotas.entry: It shuts its nostrils tight then  travels through sand as if walking.  They form colonies of around ten.

hippowdon.name: HIPPOWDON
hippowdon.entry: It is surprisingly quick to anger.  It holds its mouth agape as a  display of its strength.

skorupi.name: SKORUPI
skorupi.entry: As soon as the tail claws close,  its needle tips secrete poison.  It can survive a year without food.

drapion.name: DRAPION
drapion.entry: Possessing a sturdy build, it takes  pride in its strength, taking down  foes without using toxins.

croagunk.name: CROAGUNK
croagunk.entry: It rarely fights fairly, but that is  strictly to ensure survival. It is  popular as a mascot.

toxicroak.name: TOXICROAK
toxicroak.entry: It has a poison sac at its throat.  When it croaks, the stored poison  is churned for greater potency.

carnivine.name: CARNIVINE
carnivine.entry: It binds itself to trees in marshes.  It attracts prey with its sweet-  smelling drool and gulps them down.

finneon.name: FINNEON
finneon.entry: The line running down its side can  store sunlight. It shines vividly at  night.

lumineon.name: LUMINEON
lumineon.entry: It crawls along the seafloor using  its long front fins like legs. It  competes for food with LANTURN.

mantyke.name: MANTYKE
mantyke.entry: People organize tours to see this  Pokémon frolic and skim the tops  of waves with REMORAID.

snover.name: SNOVER
snover.entry: Seemingly curious about people,  they gather around footsteps they  find on snowy mountains.

abomasnow.name: ABOMASNOW
abomasnow.entry: They appear when the snow flowers  bloom. When the petals fall, they  retreat to places unknown again.

weavile.name: WEAVILE
weavile.entry: Evolution made it even more  devious. It communicates by clawing  signs in boulders.

magnezone.name: MAGNEZONE
magnezone.entry: A group tried to use scientific  means to make MAGNEZONE evolve,  but their efforts ended in failure.

lickilicky.name: LICKILICKY
lickilicky.entry: The long tongue is always soggy  with slobber. The saliva contains  a solvent that causes numbness.

rhyperior.name: RHYPERIOR
rhyperior.entry: It can launch a rock held in its  hand like a missile by tightening  then expanding muscles instantly.

tangrowth.name: TANGROWTH
tangrowth.entry: Its arms are made of plants that  bind themselves to things. They  grow back right away if cut.

electivire.name: ELECTIVIRE
electivire.entry: Heedless of enemy attacks, it  closes in, shoves its tails onto the  foe, then looses high voltage.

magmortar.name: MAGMORTAR
magmortar.entry: When launching 3,600 degrees F  fireballs, its body takes on a  whitish hue from the intense heat.

togekiss.name: TOGEKISS
togekiss.entry: It shares many blessings with  people who respect one another’s  rights and avoid needless strife.

yanmega.name: YANMEGA
yanmega.entry: Its jaw power is incredible. It is  adept at biting apart foes while  flying by at high speed.

leafeon.name: LEAFEON
leafeon.entry: It basically does not fight. With  cells similar to those of plants, it  can perform photosynthesis.

glaceon.name: GLACEON
glaceon.entry: By controlling its body heat, it can  freeze the atmosphere around it  to make a diamond-dust flurry.

gliscor.name: GLISCOR
gliscor.entry: If it succeeds in catching even a  faint breeze properly, it can circle  the globe without flapping once.

mamoswine.name: MAMOSWINE
mamoswine.entry: A frozen one was dug up from  soil dating back 10,000 years. It  woke up to much amazement.

porygon_z.name: PORYGON-Z
porygon_z.entry: Its programming was modified to  enable work in alien dimensions.  It did not work as planned.

gallade.name: GALLADE
gallade.entry: When trying to protect someone,  it extends its elbows as if they  were swords and fights savagely.

probopass.name: PROBOPASS
probopass.entry: It freely controls three small  units called Mini-Noses using  magnetic force.

dusknoir.name: DUSKNOIR
dusknoir.entry: It is said to take lost spirits  into its pliant body and guide  them home.

froslass.name: FROSLASS
froslass.entry: It freezes prey by blowing its -58  degrees F breath. It is said to  then secretly display its prey.

rotom.name: ROTOM
rotom.entry: Its electric-like body can enter  some kinds of machines and take  control in order to make mischief.

uxie.name: UXIE
uxie.entry: When UXIE flew, people gained the  ability to solve problems.  It was the birth of knowledge.

mesprit.name: MESPRIT
mesprit.entry: When MESPRIT flew, people learned  the joy and sadness of living.  It was the birth of emotions.

azelf.name: AZELF
azelf.entry: When AZELF flew, people gained the  determination to do things.  It was the birth of willpower.

dialga.name: DIALGA
dialga.entry: A legendary Pokémon of Sinnoh.  It is said that time flows when  DIALGA’s heart beats.

palkia.name: PALKIA
palkia.entry: A legendary Pokémon of Sinnoh.  It is said that space becomes more  stable with PALKIA’s every breath.

heatran.name: HEATRAN
heatran.entry: Its body is made of rugged steel.  However, it is partially melted in  spots because of its own heat.

regigigas.name: REGIGIGAS
regigigas.entry: It is said to have made Pokémon  that look like itself from a special  ice mountain, rocks, and magma.

giratina.name: GIRATINA
giratina.entry: It was banished for its violence.  It silently gazed upon the old  world from the Distortion World.

cresselia.name: CRESSELIA
cresselia.entry: On nights around the quarter moon,  the aurora from its tail extends  and undulates beautifully.

phione.name: PHIONE
phione.entry: It drifts in warm seas. It always  returns to where it was born, no  matter how far it may have drifted.

manaphy.name: MANAPHY
manaphy.entry: It is born with a wondrous power  that lets it bond with any kind of  Pokémon.

darkrai.name: DARKRAI
darkrai.entry: To protect itself, it afflicts those  around it with nightmares. However,  it means no harm.

shaymin.name: SHAYMIN
shaymin.entry: The flowers all over its body burst  into bloom if it is lovingly hugged  and senses gratitude.

arceus.name: ARCEUS
arceus.entry: It is said to have emerged from an  egg in a place where there was  nothing, then shaped the world.
